steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The problem says the mass m is "positive": that means m > 0.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: The mass must also be "less than 510 grams": that means m < 510.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Both constraints must hold simultaneously, giving the compound inequality 0 < m < 510. That confirms D is correct.

choiceElimination:
• Choice A — $m \gt 510$: This says mass exceeds 510 grams, which contradicts the "less than 510" requirement. ✗
  • Choice B — $m \lt 0$: This says mass is negative, which contradicts the "positive mass" requirement. ✗
  • Choice C — $-510 \lt m \lt 0$: This describes a negative range of mass, but the problem specifies a positive mass. ✗
  • Choice D — $0 \lt m \lt 510$: Captures both constraints: m > 0 (positive) and m < 510 (less than 510 grams). ✓
That confirms D is correct.
